'''PS-29-2''', nicknamed '''Mynock''', was a [[TIE pilot]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Shadow wing]] and flew under the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] [[Shadow Two (Shadow wing)|Shadow Two]]. When not tweaking the control systems of his [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]], PS-29-2 studied [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] schematics.<ref name="JKTCG" /> His fighter was used to enforce [[Blockade/Legends|blockades]], and had exquisite handling for slashing attacks on unescorted [[Transport/Legends|transports]] and [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]].<ref name="JKTCG2">{{JKTCG|set=Premiere|cardname=Shadow Two|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/73022/cid/5265142/2001-Decipher-Jedi-Knights-TCG:-Premiere-63R-Shadow-Two?PageIndex=1}}</ref> PS-29-2 wore a [[Color/Legends|black]] TIE [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] and [[Jumpsuit/Legends|jumpsuit]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
PS-29-2 was created for the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
